name: Frankfurter_get_exchange_rates
description: Get current or historical currency exchange rates using the Frankfurter API (European Central Bank data). Supports 33 currencies. Returns exchange rates relative to a base currency. No authentication required. More reliable than other free FX APIs.

base.description: Base currency code. Default: EUR. Examples: 'USD', 'EUR', 'GBP', 'JPY', 'CHF', 'CAD', 'AUD'

to.description: Target currencies (comma-separated). Default: all 33 currencies. Examples: 'USD,GBP,JPY', 'EUR,CHF'

date.description: Historical date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit for latest rates. Data available from 1999-01-04. Examples: '2020-01-01', '2023-06-15'

rates.description: Exchange rates keyed by currency code
